heading: Records of certification
label: 3310 Records of certification
text: The Secretary shall keep records of certificates of inspection of vessels and of all acts in the examination and inspection of vessels, whether of approval or disapproval.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)331046:414Section 3310 contains the requirement for maintaining inspection records.
Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Apr. 15, 1984section 2(g)(1) of Pub. L. 98–89section 3101 of this title
